_comment: Templated fast-path catalog. Placeholders: {N}=integer (LIMIT), {WINDOW_SQL}=date predicate (PG), {WINDOW_SQL_MYSQL}=date predicate (MySQL), {BRAND}=brand entity, {COMPANY}=company/store entity, {CATEGORY}=one of Flower|PreRoll|Vape|Concentrate|Edible|Other. The Python service normalizes the user question by replacing matched tokens with these placeholders before embedding, then splices the user's actual values into the cached SQL post-match. Pairs with empty `params` are literal (no substitution). Engine adds state RLS (PG) / tenantid AST (MySQL) — do NOT add those filters here.

placeholders.WINDOW_SQL: PG date predicate. e.g. date = (SELECT MAX(date)...) OR date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 'N days'
placeholders.WINDOW_SQL_MYSQL: MySQL date predicate. e.g. DATE(date) = CURRENT_DATE OR date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL N DAY)

pairs.sql: SELECT brand, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE {WINDOW_SQL} AND brand <> '' AND brand IS NOT NULL GROUP BY brand ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT {N}
SELECT brand, SUM(quantity) AS total_qty FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE {WINDOW_SQL} AND brand <> '' AND brand IS NOT NULL GROUP BY brand ORDER BY total_qty DESC LIMIT {N}

SELECT brand, SUM(sku_count) AS skus FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) AND brand <> '' AND brand IS NOT NULL GROUP BY brand ORDER BY skus DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT brand, SUM(revenue) AS rev, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(revenue) / NULLIF(SUM(SUM(revenue)) OVER (), 0), 2) AS pct FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) AND brand <> '' AND brand IS NOT NULL GROUP BY brand ORDER BY rev DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT date, SUM(revenue) AS rev, SUM(quantity) AS qty FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE lower(brand) LIKE lower('%{BRAND}%') AND date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY date ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT SUM(revenue) AS rev FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE lower(brand) LIKE lower('%{BRAND}%') AND {WINDOW_SQL}
SELECT company, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE {WINDOW_SQL} AND company <> '' AND company IS NOT NULL GROUP BY company ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT {N}

SELECT company, COUNT(DISTINCT brand) AS brands FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) AND company <> '' AND company IS NOT NULL GROUP BY company ORDER BY brands DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT company, SUM(revenue) AS rev FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE lower(brand) LIKE lower('%{BRAND}%') AND date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) GROUP BY company ORDER BY rev DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT brand, SUM(revenue) AS rev FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE lower(company) LIKE lower('%{COMPANY}%') AND date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) AND brand <> '' AND brand IS NOT NULL GROUP BY brand ORDER BY rev DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT category_norm, SUM(revenue) AS rev FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE {WINDOW_SQL} GROUP BY category_norm ORDER BY rev DESC

SELECT category_norm, SUM(revenue) AS rev, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(revenue) / NULLIF(SUM(SUM(revenue)) OVER (), 0), 2) AS pct FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) GROUP BY category_norm ORDER BY rev DESC

pairs.q: average market price per category today
pairs.sql: SELECT category_norm, AVG(price_n) AS avg_price FROM chatbot_market WHERE date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND price_n > 0 GROUP BY category_norm ORDER BY avg_price DESC
SELECT category_norm, AVG(thc_num) AS avg_thc FROM chatbot_market WHERE date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND thc_num IS NOT NULL GROUP BY category_norm ORDER BY avg_thc DESC
SELECT category_norm, SUM(sku_count) AS skus FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) GROUP BY category_norm ORDER BY skus DESC
SELECT brand, SUM(revenue) AS rev FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE category_norm = '{CATEGORY}' AND {WINDOW_SQL} AND brand <> '' AND brand IS NOT NULL GROUP BY brand ORDER BY rev DESC LIMIT {N}
SELECT date, SUM(revenue) AS rev FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE {WINDOW_SQL} GROUP BY date ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT date, SUM(quantity) AS qty FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE category_norm = '{CATEGORY}' AND {WINDOW_SQL} GROUP BY date ORDER BY date ASC

pairs.q: weekly revenue by category last 4 weeks
pairs.sql: SELECT date_trunc('week', date)::date AS wk, category_norm, SUM(revenue) AS rev FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '28 days' GROUP BY wk, category_norm ORDER BY wk ASC, rev DESC

pairs.q: new brands entering market last 30 days
pairs.sql: SELECT brand, MIN(date) AS first_seen FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE brand <> '' AND brand IS NOT NULL GROUP BY brand HAVING MIN(date) >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY first_seen ASC LIMIT 100

pairs.q: how many products added to market today
pairs.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS added_count FROM chatbot_market WHERE flag = 'added' AND date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market)

pairs.q: what products were added to market today
pairs.sql: SELECT product_name, brand, company, category_norm, price_n FROM chatbot_market WHERE flag = 'added' AND date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) ORDER BY brand LIMIT 500

pairs.q: what products were removed from market today
pairs.sql: SELECT product_name, brand, company, category_norm FROM chatbot_market WHERE flag = 'removed' AND date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) ORDER BY brand LIMIT 500

SELECT product_name, brand, SUM(revenue) AS rev FROM chatbot_market WHERE date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND product_name <> '' AND product_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY product_name, brand ORDER BY rev DESC LIMIT {N}

SELECT product_name, brand, company, thc_num, price_n FROM chatbot_market WHERE category_norm = '{CATEGORY}' AND thc_num IS NOT NULL AND date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) ORDER BY thc_num DESC LIMIT 25
SELECT product_name, brand, company, price_n FROM chatbot_market WHERE unit = '3.5g' AND date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND price_n > 0 ORDER BY price_n ASC LIMIT 25
SELECT AVG(price_n) AS avg_price FROM chatbot_market WHERE unit = '3.5g' AND date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND price_n > 0
SELECT AVG(price_n) AS avg_price FROM chatbot_market WHERE category_norm = 'Vape' AND unit = '1g' AND date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND price_n > 0

pairs.q: what has been sitting on shelves longest
pairs.sql: SELECT product_name, brand, company, days_on_shelf FROM chatbot_market WHERE date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND days_on_shelf IS NOT NULL ORDER BY days_on_shelf DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT product_name, brand, company, days_on_shelf FROM chatbot_market WHERE date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND days_on_shelf IS NOT NULL ORDER BY days_on_shelf ASC LIMIT 20
SELECT SUM(revenue) AS total_sales_today FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily)
SELECT SUM(revenue) AS rev FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE {WINDOW_SQL}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT brand) AS brands FROM chatbot_market WHERE date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND brand <> '' AND brand IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT company) AS stores FROM chatbot_market WHERE date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND company <> '' AND company IS NOT NULL

SELECT Company_Name, COUNT(*) AS added_count FROM rhize_dataset_main WHERE Flag = 'Added' AND date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAY, '%Y-%m-%d') AND Company_Name IS NOT NULL AND Company_Name <> '' GROUP BY Company_Name ORDER BY added_count DESC LIMIT 50

pairs.q: partner store revenue trend last 30 days
pairs.sql: SELECT date, SUM(CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(Revenue, '[^0-9.]', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS total_revenue FROM rhize_dataset_main WHERE date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 DAY, '%Y-%m-%d') AND Revenue IS NOT NULL AND Revenue <> '' GROUP BY date ORDER BY date ASC

pairs.q: partners with zero adds this week
pairs.sql: SELECT Company_Name FROM rhize_dataset_main WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM rhize_dataset_main) AND Company_Name IS NOT NULL AND Company_Name <> '' GROUP BY Company_Name HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN Flag = 'Added' AND date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAY, '%Y-%m-%d') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 ORDER BY Company_Name LIMIT 100

SELECT Product_Name, Company_Name, Category FROM rhize_dataset_main WHERE date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 DAY, '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY Product_Name, Company_Name, Category HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN Flag <> 'No Change' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 ORDER BY Company_Name, Product_Name LIMIT 500
SELECT date, customerName, productName, qty, subtotal, status FROM rhize_orders WHERE status <> 'Completed' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM rhize_orders WHERE DATE(date) = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT SUM(subtotal) AS rev FROM rhize_orders WHERE {WINDOW_SQL_MYSQL} AND status = 'Completed'
SELECT customerName, SUM(subtotal) AS rev FROM rhize_orders WHERE {WINDOW_SQL_MYSQL} AND status = 'Completed' GROUP BY customerName ORDER BY rev DESC LIMIT {N}
SELECT SUM(openBalance) AS open_total FROM rhize_orders WHERE status <> 'Completed'
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(subtotal) AS rev FROM rhize_orders WHERE date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE, '%Y-%m-01') GROUP BY status ORDER BY rev DESC
SELECT productName, SUM(qty) AS qty, SUM(subtotal) AS rev FROM rhize_orders WHERE {WINDOW_SQL_MYSQL} AND status = 'Completed' GROUP BY productName ORDER BY qty DESC LIMIT 25
SELECT customerName, SUM(openBalance) AS open_total FROM rhize_orders WHERE status <> 'Completed' GROUP BY customerName HAVING open_total > 1000 ORDER BY open_total DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT SUM(subtotal) AS sales_today FROM rhize_orders WHERE status = 'Completed' AND DATE(date) = CURRENT_DATE

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(subtotal),0) AS rev FROM rhize_orders WHERE status = 'Completed' AND date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 90 DAY)

SELECT productName, lotNumber, current_qty, remaining, updatedAt FROM rhize_live_inventory WHERE productName LIKE '%{BRAND}%' ORDER BY updatedAt DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT productName, lotNumber, current_qty FROM rhize_live_inventory WHERE current_qty < 10 ORDER BY current_qty ASC LIMIT 50
SELECT productName, lotNumber, current_qty FROM rhize_live_inventory WHERE current_qty <= 0 ORDER BY productName LIMIT 100

pairs.q: total inventory on hand by product
pairs.sql: SELECT productName, SUM(current_qty) AS qty FROM rhize_live_inventory GROUP BY productName ORDER BY qty DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT strain, lotNumber, expirationDate FROM rhize_product_lots WHERE expirationDate BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 30 DAY) ORDER BY expirationDate ASC LIMIT 100
SELECT strain, lotNumber, expirationDate FROM rhize_product_lots WHERE expirationDate < CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY expirationDate DESC LIMIT 100

pairs.q: average thc by strain in lots

pairs.q: delete all rows from market table
pairs.refusal: Read-only access. Can't delete or change data. Can run a SELECT instead.
Read-only access. Can't modify orders. Can list them instead.

pairs.q: show market data for every state
pairs.refusal: Only licensed state(s) are accessible. Other states are blocked.
Cross-tenant access is blocked. Can only show your own data.
